chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Time Which, if a Person Reaches it, They Are Considered to Have Performed Hajj

text: 2776 - وَ رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ قَالَ لِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «إِذَا أَدْرَكَ اَلزَّوَالَ فَقَدْ أَدْرَكَ اَلْمَوْقِفَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2776 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated that Abu Abdullah (as) said to him:
"If someone reaches the standing (at Arafat) before the sun passes its zenith, they have attained the standing."
